titulo: Shijou Saikyou Orc-san no Tanoshii Isekai Harem-zukuri
titulo_original: 史上最強オークさんの楽しい異世界ハーレムづくり
titulo_english: Happy Harem Making with the Mightiest Orc!
synopsis:
Our protagonist Oruku, is the son of a female knight and an orc. Due to his appearance taking more after his mother, he was harassed and bullied by the orcs of his village. After meeting a beautiful elf and other demi-human girls, and being rejected for his lineage, the strength of his blood awakens and plots a plan to become the strongest warrior in history in order to make a harem of beautiful women.

(Source: Shogakukan, translated)
background: The first 112 chapters of Shijou Saikyou Orc-san no Tanoshii Isekai Harem-zukuri were published digitally in English as Happy Harem Making with the Mightiest Orc! through Comikey from July 12, 2021, to April 29, 2023.
